name: ABVC BIOPHARMA, INC.
business: ABVC BioPharma Inc. is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on development of new drugs and medical devices, all of which are derived from plants. Another part of the Company's business is conducted by BioKey, a wholly owned subsidiary, that is engaged in a wide range of services, including API characterization, pre-formulation studies, formulation development, analytical method development, stability studies, IND/NDA/ANDA/510K submissions, and manufacturing clinical trial materials and commercial manufacturing.

exposures.sentence: The Company researches and develops the following seven drug products and one medical device: ABV-1501, ABV-1504, ABV-1505, ABV-1519, ABV-1702, ABV-1601 and ABV-1703.
The Phase II study has started in the 2 nd quarter of 2023.

catalysts.event: BioFirst targeting to complete construction of GMP factory
catalysts.sentence: BioFirst is targeting to complete the construction in 2026.
